summary: Verified major refactoring: extracted sign placement (useSignPlacement.ts) and HUD config (useHudConfig.ts) hooks. All 15 backend API tests passed. All 13 sidebar tabs navigable. Navigation view loads correctly with map, search bar, weather widget, and HUD elements. Display Layout shows Live Preview with 31 draggable elements in Edit mode. Privacy policy page loads at /privacy.html. No regressions found after hook extraction.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: useSignPlacement hook correctly extracted with syncVisibleSigns, registerSign, and all place* functions (placeHighwayShields, placeExitSigns, placeCurveSigns, placeSpeedLimitSigns, placeTrafficSlowdowns, placeCmvWarnings, placeTruckWarnings)
VERIFIED: useHudConfig hook correctly extracted with hudLayout, hudPositions, hudScales state and event listeners
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx properly imports and uses both hooks (lines 68-69, 340-348)
VERIFIED: syncVisibleSignsRef.current() called on map moveend/zoomend events (lines 840, 850)
VERIFIED: Sign placement functions called during route processing (lines 4356-4368)
VERIFIED: capacitor.config.ts has webContentsDebuggingEnabled=false for production Android builds
VERIFIED: privacy.html served correctly from /public/ with all required sections

test_credentials.guest: Click 'Continue as Guest' button on login screen

context_for_next_testing_agent: Major refactoring verified: ~380 lines extracted from NavigationView.tsx into hooks/useSignPlacement.ts and hooks/useHudConfig.ts. GoogleMapsNavigationView.tsx was deleted (eliminated 46 TS errors). Store submission configs added. All features working correctly. Preview URL: https://hud-customizer-5.preview.emergentagent.com

hook_extraction_useSignPlacement.details: Sign placement hook properly extracted with syncVisibleSigns, registerSign, and all place* functions

hook_extraction_useHudConfig.details: HUD config hook properly extracted with hudLayout, hudPositions, hudScales state management

navigation_view.details: Navigation view loads with Leaflet map, search bar, weather widget (44°F), compass rose, and map controls

sidebar_tabs.details: All 13 sidebar items navigable: Dashboard, Navigation, Load Board, Truck Stops, Pay Summary, Maintenance, History, Fuel Network, Community, ELD Logs, Offline Maps, Display, Settings

display_layout.details: Display Layout shows Live Preview with 21/21 visible elements, Edit Layout mode enables 31 drag handles

community_view.details: Community view shows category stats (5 Parking, 1 Fuel Price, 1 Weigh Station, 4 Road Hazard), live feed with 11 reports, submit form

eld_logs_view.details: ELD Logs view shows daily log graph, status buttons (OFF, SLEEPER, ON DUTY, DRIVE), status changes

offline_maps_view.details: Offline Maps shows 5 download regions (US Midwest, South, Northeast, West, Southeast) with tile estimates and storage summary

dashboard_eld_sync.details: Dashboard ELD Status card shows OFF DUTY, View Logs button navigates to ELD Logs view

privacy_page.details: Privacy policy page loads at /privacy.html with all required sections

backend_api_community_reports.details: GET /api/community/reports returns JSON with reports array

backend_api_crash_prediction.details: POST /api/crash-prediction with bbox returns incident analysis with riskScore, warnings, recommendation

backend_api_parking_predict.details: GET /api/poi/parking-predict?poiId=test returns prediction with fillPercent, forecast

capacitor_config.details: webContentsDebuggingEnabled=false set for production Android builds

mocked_apis.none: No mocked APIs - all APIs are real
